hero.title: computational intelligence
taglines: for teams who refuse to compromise.
hero.description: Guided builds, measurable outcomes, zero hype.

services.label: Services
services.title: Services that ship excellence.
services.subtitle: We're a luxury technology practice for entrepreneurs and early-stage startups who refuse to compromise on quality.

items.title: Product Development
items.copy: From zero to launch and beyond. We build digital products that people actually want to use — polished, thoughtful experiences that feel premium from day one.

items.title: Product Design
items.copy: Interface and experience design that delights. We believe all digital products should be beautiful — thoughtful design that makes complex things feel simple.

items.title: Product Management
items.copy: Strategic direction meets tactical execution. Great products don't just happen — they're the result of ruthless prioritization, clear strategy, and relentless focus.

items.title: Strategic Planning
items.copy: Future-proof your business with intentional strategy. Most companies react to the market. Great ones shape it.

items.title: Brand & Marketing
items.copy: Help brands deliver their stories online. Your brand isn't your logo — it's what people think and feel when they encounter your company.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.copy: Expert guidance when you need it most. We've built dozens of products and made every mistake there is to make. Learn from our scars.

items.title: Modernization
items.copy: Replace outdated tooling with modern web services. That system you built 5 years ago? It's holding you back. Let's modernize it.

items.title: Growth & Optimization
items.copy: Increase traffic, engagement, and conversion. You've built something great. Now let's get it in front of more people.

items.title: Photography & Visual
items.copy: Elevate your brand with professional imagery. Stock photos are boring. Your brand deserves better.

work.label: Selected work
work.title: Proof in production.
work.subtitle: Real outcomes for real teams. Not prototypes — shipped systems with measurable results.

items.title: Clarity over hype
items.description: Say the hard thing plainly. Reduce noise, surface the decision, and make the next step obvious.

items.title: Systems over features
items.description: Design the working whole, not isolated wins. The product should stay coherent as it grows.

items.title: Taste over noise
items.description: Favor restraint, proportion, and sharp language over clutter. The interface should feel composed.

items.title: Execution over decks
items.description: Ship the thing. Reduce ceremony, close the loop, and learn from real use.

items.title: Operating mode
items.description: Small team. High standard. End-to-end. No sprawl, no theater.

ventures.label: Ventures
ventures.title: We build what we believe in.
ventures.subtitle: Client work funds internal product development. We eat our own cooking.

about.label: About
about.title: Ambitious teams need more than prototypes.
about.description: Strategy, systems, craft, and execution. From concept to shipping product. For founders and teams who refuse to compromise.
about.antiposition: If you're looking for cheap and fast, we're not for you.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Ready to build something real?
contact.subtitle: Concept, mess, ambition, rebuild — bring it. We bring structure, standards, and execution.
contact.promise: We reply within 24 hours with a 30-minute discovery call.
